positive: Minimalist celestial forest scene, highly detailed, centered composition, featuring geometric bioluminescent mushrooms and branching root systems under a starry night sky. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau botanical illustration and modern graphic design, emphasizing strong, clean silhouettes and deep contrasts. Color palette dominated by sapphire blues, emerald greens, and vibrant electric violets, with touches of metallic gold accents. Suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Dramatic, soft edge lighting, high resolution, symmetrical composition, vector art influence.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, low resolution, bad anatomy, noise, dirty, grain, gradient noise, poorly drawn, extra limbs, asymmetrical, messy background
